name: Transactional Practice
summary: Root skill for all transactional legal work including contracts, deals, and business formations.
content:
# Transactional Practice

This is the parent category for all transactional skills. Transactional work involves structuring, negotiating, and documenting business deals and agreements.

## Sub-areas
- Mergers & Acquisitions
- Commercial Real Estate
- Residential Real Estate
- Loan & Financing
- Franchise Agreements
- Employment & Consulting
- Asset Purchase
- Estate Planning
- Intellectual Property Licensing
- Commercial Leasing

## Key Principles
- Clear and precise drafting
- Risk allocation and mitigation
- Due diligence thoroughness
- Client business objectives alignment
- Regulatory compliance
